title: Messy War, Happy Stock Markets
summary_full: On the surface, the recent rally doesn’t seem to make sense: Oil prices are high and a peace deal with Iran remains elusive. Here’s what’s going on.
summary_public: On the surface, the recent rally doesn’t seem to make sense: Oil prices are high and a peace deal with Iran remains elusive. Here’s what’s going on.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: peace deal with Iran remains elusive
